name: @m64/pi-remembra-theme
description: A beautiful dark theme for pi coding agent inspired by the Remembra web interface, featuring sophisticated purple-blue gradients and carefully balanced text colors.
readme: # Remembra Theme for Pi Coding Agent A beautiful dark theme for [pi coding agent](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) inspired by the color palette of the [Remembra](https://github.com/M64GitHub/remembra) web interface. Preview ## Features - **Deep layered backgrounds** - From `#0a0a10` to `#202030` creating visual depth - **Beautiful purple-blue gradients** - Primary accent `#667eea` and secondary `#764ba2` - **Carefully balanced text hierarchy** - From bright `#e8e8f0` to subtle `#404050` - **Elegant syntax highlighting** - Indigo keywords, cyan code, emerald strings - **Professional markdown styling** - Clean headings, beautiful code blocks, elegant quotes - **Thoughtful thinking level indicators** - Visual hierarchy from dim to bright pink - **Export-ready** - Optimized colors for HTML export ## Installation ### Via Pi Package Manager (Recommended) ```bash pi install npm:@m64/pi-remembra-theme ``` ### Via Git ```bash pi install git:github.com/m64/pi-remembra-theme ``` ### Manual Installation 1. Download `remembra.json` 2. Place it in `~/.pi/agent/themes/` (global) or `.pi/themes/` (project) ## Usage After installation, select the theme: 1. Type `/settings` in pi 2. Choose "remembra" from the theme dropdown 3. Or edit your `settings.json`: ```json { "theme": "remembra" } ``` ## Color Palette ### Backgrounds - **Deep**: `#0a0a10` - Deepest background - **Primary**: `#0d0d14` - Main background - **Secondary**: `#14141f` - Message backgrounds - **Tertiary**: `#1a1a28` - Code blocks, elevated surfaces - **Elevated**: `#202030` - Selection, hover states ### Text - **Primary**: `#e8e8f0` - Main content text - **Secondary**: `#9090a8` - Subheadings, metadata - **Muted**: `#606078` - Placeholder text - **Dim**: `#404050` - Comments, least important ### Accents - **Primary**: `#667eea` - Links, highlights, borders - **Secondary**: `#764ba2` - Functions, high thinking level - **Success**: `#4ade80` - Strings, success states - **Warning**: `#fbbf24` - Numbers, bash mode, warnings - **Error**: `#f87171` - Error states, deleted lines - **Info**: `#60a5fa` - Variables, info states ### Syntax - **Keywords**: `#818cf8` (indigo) - **Functions**: `#764ba2` (purple) - **Strings**: `#4ade80` (emerald) - **Numbers**: `#fbbf24` (amber) - **Types**: `#a78bfa` (violet) - **Variables**: `#60a5fa` (blue) - **Comments**: `#404050` (dim gray) ## Inspiration This theme draws inspiration from the beautiful [Remembra](https://github.com/M64GitHub/remembra) web interface, translating its dark aesthetic and purple-blue color harmony to the terminal environment of pi coding agent. ## License MIT © m64 ## Contributing Issues and pull requests welcome at [github.com/m64/pi-remembra-theme](https://github.com/m64/pi-remembra-theme)
